---
id: discount-factor-range
title: "Range of discount factors at day offsets"
description: "Returns a table of interpolated discount factors at evenly-spaced day offsets from the as-of date. Tenor input is in days; the response includes both the day offset and the resolved tenor date (asOfDate + tenorDays). Valid only for DISCOUNT or OIS indexes."
sidebar_label: "Range of discount factors at day offsets"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Range of discount factors at day offsets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/indexes/{name}/discount-factors"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a table of interpolated discount factors at evenly-spaced day offsets from the as-of date. Tenor input is in days; the response includes both the day offset and the resolved tenor date (asOfDate + tenorDays). Valid only for DISCOUNT or OIS indexes.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
